description: fast-check is imported in step2-serialize-note.test.ts (line 12: import { fc } from '@fast-check/vitest') but never used. PROP-001 and PROP-002 are marked as Tier 1 (property-based test with fast-check, required: true) in verification-architecture.md, but the actual tests are example-based only. This is legitimately deferred to Phase 5 per Sprint 2 FIND-003 agreement, but the unused import should be removed to avoid confusion about current verification coverage.
